title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #1, Big Mom, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Already all the way over here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Her tree target is in her grasp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Something's wrong with her for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was like the giants' move, wasn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA! Forgive me-ju! They threatened me-ju!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad! She's gonna send out another one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We needa get down and fight her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who was that woman back there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: She must be some sort of demon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no use! We won't be able to fully dodge the next one!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop, Luffy! I've got a plan!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 36 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
